name: Terry's Turtle Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Prepare cake batter according to box directions. Pour half of the batter into a 9 x 13-inch pan.
Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes. Melt caramels, margarine, and evaporated milk together. Blend well and pour over the hot cake. Sprinkle chocolate chips and pecans over the caramel mixture. Top with the remaining cake batter. Bake for an additional 15 minutes in a 350 degree oven. Frost with favorite chocolate frosting if desired.
